task: Type-3 DFIG deep three-phase fault internal LVRT offline response analysis
mapping_method: Latest 3IBR.inf PGB index mapped to 3IBR_NN.out using 10 channels per file; column 1 is time, data column=((PGB-1) mod 10)+2.

conclusions.dc_link_overvoltage_candidate: Edc_pu peaks at 1.427780 near 2.00860 s during the 2.0-2.15 s fault, with Ecap_Det peaking at 2.070126 kV candidate. Base/unit requires GUI confirmation.
conclusions.rsc_gsc_current_increase: RSC I_RS three-phase max abs reaches 1.715329 kA candidate; GSC Iconv reaches 1.532807 kA candidate during the fault.
conclusions.mechanical_speed_recovery: Wpu mean changes from 1.205632 pre-fault to max 1.218622 during fault and 1.200021 post-fault, indicating recovery close to pre-fault value.
conclusions.crowbar_interpretation: Only Crowbar candidate response can be stated: Reset and Mono_out change, BRK_CHOP pulses, but Iovercur and S1 remain zero and Crowbar current is near zero. GUI confirmation is required before claiming Crowbar action.

manual_gui_confirmation_required: Meaning and active direction of Crowbar_prot S1, Mono_out, Reset, and Iovercur.
Physical unit/base of Ecap_Det and Edc_pu.
Phase order/sign convention of I_RS, Iconv, and Crowbar current.
Which duplicated Iqr_pu/Pg_pu/Qg_pu channels should be used as formal interpretation channels.
